flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Nazarene Bible College are 36% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($41.5k vs $65.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Nazarene Bible College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (347 → 284).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Nazarene Bible College rose 87% between 2019 and 2022 (35.7% → 66.7%).
